---
name: Docs adoption help
about: Ask how to apply the standard to a target repository
title: "[Adoption]: "
labels: question
assignees: ""
---

## Target Repo Shape

Describe the project type, stack, and current docs situation.

## Goal

Explain whether you are bootstrapping docs, auditing existing docs, improving
handoff, or standardizing across agents.

## Current Blocker

Describe what is unclear or difficult to apply.
